notes: Verifier contract stores the generated UltraHonk verification key.
Account WASM is uploaded and __check_auth binds verifier public inputs to the owner commitment, Soroban payload hash, network hash, expiry ledger, and wallet scheme.
The deployerContractId deploys and initializes account contracts with owner commitment and verifier config.
This manifest includes deployed infrastructure only and does not claim a working transfer flow.
